title: Hydron Energy Announces Sale of its First Commercial RNG Production Plant
content: Hydron Energy Inc. has received the first order for its first of the kind commercial INTRUPTor-Mid biogas upgrading plant. Hydron will manufacture, deliver, and commission the Renewable Natural Gas Plant in eastern Ontario, Canada. Hydron Energyâ€™s Intensified Regenerative Upgrading Platform Technology (INTRUPTorâ„¢) is a disruptive solution that will revolutionize various market sectors within the gas separation and upgrading industries. Hydron Energy has commercialized this platform technology to produce renewable natural gas (RNG) from anaerobic digesters, waste-water treatment plants, and landfills.
author: Analysts Account
